search_document:
User Request: Freight cost analysis.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Freight Cost Trend
Type: chart
Description: Monthly trend of freight costs
Title: Freight Costs by Region
Type: table
Description: Freight costs aggregated by region
Title: Total Freight Costs
Type: kpi
Description: Overall freight costs
Title: Freight Costs by Shipping Method
Type: chart
Description: Freight costs breakdown by shipping method
Title: Freight Costs by Customer Type
Type: table
Description: Freight costs aggregated by customer type

sql_queries.title: Freight Cost Trend
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(Freight) AS TotalFreight FROM Orders GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Freight Costs by Region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT ShipRegion, SUM(Freight) AS TotalFreight FROM Orders GROUP BY ShipRegion

sql_queries.title: Total Freight Costs
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(Freight) AS TotalFreight FROM Orders

sql_queries.title: Freight Costs by Shipping Method
sql_queries.description: Freight costs breakdown by shipping method
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Shippers.CompanyName, SUM(Orders.Freight) AS TotalFreight FROM Orders JOIN Shippers ON Orders.ShipVia = Shippers.ShipperID GROUP BY Shippers.CompanyName

sql_queries.title: Freight Costs by Customer Type
sql_queries.description: Freight costs aggregated by customer type
sql_queries.sql: SELECT CustomerDemographics.CustomerDesc, SUM(Orders.Freight) AS TotalFreight FROM Orders JOIN CustomerCustomerDemo ON Orders.CustomerID = CustomerCustomerDemo.CustomerID JOIN CustomerDemographics ON CustomerCustomerDemo.CustomerTypeID = CustomerDemographics.CustomerTypeID GROUP BY CustomerDemographics.CustomerDesc
